testcase.name: Status is 200 or 204
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 72e811ad-6a4e-4b1c-a15e-a0b0bbadb470. Collection name: Example API Tests Collection. Request name: Get users list. Test description: Status is 200 or 204. Error message: expected [ 200, 204 ] to include 404. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected [ 200, 204 ] to include 404 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:2).

testcase.name: Status is 201 or 200
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 72e811ad-6a4e-4b1c-a15e-a0b0bbadb470. Collection name: Example API Tests Collection. Request name: Create user. Test description: Status is 201 or 200. Error message: expected [ 200, 201 ] to include 404. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected [ 200, 201 ] to include 404 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:3).

testcase.name: Response contains id and email
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 72e811ad-6a4e-4b1c-a15e-a0b0bbadb470. Collection name: Example API Tests Collection. Request name: Create user. Test description: Response contains id and email. Error message: Unexpected token '<' at 1:1 <!DOCTYPE html> ^. Stacktrace: JSONError: Unexpected token '<' at 1:1 <!DOCTYPE html> ^ at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:3).

testcase.name: Status is 200

failure.message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 404

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: 72e811ad-6a4e-4b1c-a15e-a0b0bbadb470. Collection name: Example API Tests Collection. Request name: Get user by id. Test description: Status is 200. Error message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 404. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected response to have status code 200 but got 404 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:4).
